positive: A highly detailed, aesthetically pleasing graphic illustration featuring a minimalist woodland animal family (stylized fox, deer, and bunny) surrounded by whimsical, hand-drawn floral elements and geometric accents. The composition must be centered and vertically balanced, suitable for a chest print on clothing. Use a limited, earthy color palette (sage green, terracotta, cream, muted teal) with strong black outlines for a sophisticated silhouette effect. The style should blend modern bohemian illustration with Japanese sumi-e linework, resulting in high contrast and a clean, graphic feel. The design should look beautiful when printed on fabric.
negative: blurry, low contrast, grunge, ugly, text, watermark, signature, logo, dirty, messy, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, noise, artifact, jpeg artifacts, too much detail, photo, photorealism
